title: tmux Essential Commands
description: Key tmux commands for session and pane management.

entries.label: New Session
entries.description: Create a new named tmux session

entries.label: Navigate Panes
entries.description: Move focus between panes in the given direction

entries.label: Detach Session
entries.description: Detach from the current session (keeps it running)

entries.label: Attach Session
entries.description: Reattach to a detached tmux session

entries.label: Resize Pane
entries.description: Resize the active pane by n cells in a direction

entries.label: Copy Mode
entries.description: Enter copy mode to scroll and select text
